function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_17__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Miles,

Sharing the oldest 3 invoices linked to the tax-firm client (Claudia Reiter / Helios): INV-0006 (2025-12-18), INV-0007 (2026-01-19), and INV-0008 (2026-02-17).

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed once as required; verification: attachments were read files and ordered newest-first, recipient matches Miles canonical email, subject quoted safely. Next finalize by deleting processed inbox item.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Report completion with evidence and actions
next_step.observation: Outbound email draft record was written successfully to outbox.

Arithmetic not required.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox item and completed its request. I created an outbound draft reply at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md to miles@novak.example with the 3 oldest invoices linked to the tax-firm client (Claudia Reiter), and then removed the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read/context), read relevant nested AGENTS and inbox/email/sending workflows, used inbox header as canonical metadata, verified sender against canonical primary_contact_email, completed request, then deleted processed inbox item.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical sender matched (00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md `from` equals 10_entities/cast/miles.md primary_contact_email). Tax-firm client resolved as Claudia Reiter from 10_entities/cast/claudia.md. Linked invoices were evidenced in finance records with related_entity Claudia Reiter; oldest three by issued_on were INV-0006, INV-0007, INV-0008 from the three read invoice files. Outbound draft was written to outbox and inbox item deleted per inbox workflow.
